/usr/bin/c++  -rdynamic -O3 -fPIC -ggdb -std=c++11 -Wall -Wno-deprecated -Werror -Wno-unused-function -Wno-builtin-macro-redefined -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_scheduler.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_scheduler.dir/tests/test_scheduler.cpp.o -o /home/djintx/workspace/sylar/bin/test_scheduler  -Wl,-rpath,/home/djintx/workspace/sylar/lib /home/djintx/workspace/sylar/lib/libsylar.so -lpthread -lyaml-cpp
